item.description: Documenting my journey of building a personal NAS using NixOS.

item.title: Sops-nix Quick Start Guide
item.description: A quick guide to managing encrypted secrets in NixOS using sops-nix.

item.title: Using SOPS to Encrypt Nix Values
item.description: How to encrypt sensitive values in your Nix code using SOPS.

item.title: A770的AI使用体验
item.description: Testing the Intel Arc A770 for AI: The good, the bad, and the reality of using an Intel GPU for OLLAMA and ComfyUI

item.description: Documenting my journey of building a personal NAS using NixOS.

item.title: Docker/NixOS使用traefik实现简单反代
item.description: Easy reverse proxy setup with Traefik on Docker and NixOS.

item.title: 使用tebi作为s3,搭建nix缓存服务器
item.description: A step-by-step guide on how to set up a high-performance Nix binary cache server using TEBI as an S3-compatible storage backend. Learn how to speed up your Nix builds and reduce bandwidth costs by self-hosting your cache.

item.description: A quick guide to deploying Rancher on k3s.

item.description: A quick guide to deploying kubevirt-manager on k3s.

item.description: Configuring CloudFront CDN with automatic SSL certificates via acme.sh

item.title: 搭建泰拉瑞亚Tshock服务器(强制开荒)
item.description: Setting up a TShock server for Terraria with a 'no imported items' rule to ensure a true fresh start.
